jobs.title: Analyst III A-Brands Analytics
jobs.description: View All Jobs For Employers Join Log In   View All Jobs     Summary Generated by Built In Category/Area of Expertise: Merchandising Marketing Support Job Requisition: 489434 Address: USA-MA-Quincy-1385 Hancock Street Store Code: Sourcing A-Brands (5139547) Ahold Delhaize USA, a division of global food retailer Ahold Delhaize, is part of the U.S. family of brands, which includes five leading omnichannel grocery brands - Food Lion, Giant Food, The GIANT Company, Hannaford and Stop & Shop. Our associates support the brands with a wide range of services, including Finance, Legal, Sustainability, Commercial, Digital and E-commerce, Technology and more. Accountable to A-Brands Teams for all aspects of data needed for negotiations prep. Focused on unlocking data and insights that are geared to develop strategies/tactics to maximize scale and optimize our leverage points with CPG's. Through these negotiations, enable local brand strategies, align vendors to precise plans and leverage size/scale. Ownership and accountability of timelines and targets. **Our flexible/ hybrid work schedule includes 3 in-person days at one of our core locations and 2 remote days. Our core office locations include Salisbury, NC, Quincy, MA, Carlisle, PA, Scarborough, ME, Hyattsville, MD Essential job function: Build subject matter expertise in internal and syndicated data for assigned vendors and categories. Deliver consistent, accurate, timely and efficient data packs prior to each negotiation cycle and each Omni Review. Provide insights/ advanced analytical support to A-Brands teams to identify opportunities for growth, investment optimization and S4OC. Primary interfaces will be A-Brands Managers, CM/CM+1s. Develop/support insights for top to tops, JBP's/BBP's, FMI, executive level meetings, etc. Additional job duties may be assigned as needed to meet the needs of the business and support our Values.
